name: Beyond Access: Guided LLM Scaffolding for Independent Learning in Undergraduate Statistics

description: arXiv:2606.01375v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly entering students' learning practices, but their educational value depends on whether they support reasoning or enable task completion without engagement. This study examines guided LLM use in an undergraduate Probability and Statistics course, focusing on the gap between assigned access and...
author: Mohammad Amanlou, Yasaman Amou-Jafari, Mehrad Livian, Fatemeh Boloukazari, Fereshte Bagheri, Elahe Khodaverdi Nadrabadi, Shahab Sherafat, Behnam Bahrak
